issues.detail: The instructions do not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, such as connection failures or invalid arguments.

scenarios.name: Discover all capabilities of an MCP server
scenarios.rationale: Baseline spawned a raw child_process with hand-rolled JSON-RPC and missed prompts/list and client.close(); treatment used the Client + StdioClientTransport SDK with all three discovery methods and cleanup.

scenarios.name: Anthropic agent loop using MCP tools
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used a fake mcpClient API and terminated on a text-block flag instead of stop_reason end_turn, and dropped tool_use_id; treatment followed the documented loop with proper id mapping and callTool.
